title: Soft-Delete Strategy via deleted_at Field
context: All queryable tables use soft-delete pattern with deleted_at field (0 = active, >0 = deleted) instead of hard deletion.
decision: MUST apply active row predicates to every query. All select queries must include isActiveXXX predicate from active-row-predicates.ts. Filter by deletedAt = 0.

impact.tech: Query safety - missing predicates causes data leaks. Data integrity issues if filter missing.
impact.biz: Users expect deleted items to be invisible

title: Multi-tenant Data Isolation via uid Column
context: Echoe is a multi-tenant SaaS system.
decision: Every data query MUST include eq(table.uid, uid) in WHERE clause.

impact.tech: Data leak risk if uid filter missing

title: SSRF Protection via URL Validation
context: All external URL requests must validate against SSRF attacks.
decision: Use validateURLForSSRF() for async validation with DNS resolution.

title: Arrow Format Conversion for LanceDB Results
context: LanceDB returns results as Apache Arrow objects, not plain JSON.
decision: MUST use arrow.ts helpers: toStringList(), toStructList(), toTimestamp(). List fields must first use .toArray() method to convert to JavaScript array.

impact.tech: Runtime safety. Correctly handle Arrow data types.

title: ID Generation Centralized Management
context: All entities use type-prefixed nanoid format. System needs unified ID generation.
decision: All ID generation must be implemented in apps/server/src/utils/id.ts. Use generateTypeId(type) to generate type-prefixed ID.

title: Legacy Data Compatibility: JSON Parsing with Fallback
context: echoe migrated from Anki format. Old data uses space-delimited tags.
decision: parseTags() tries JSON array first, falls back to space-delimited.

title: FSRS Retrievability Calculation with Clock-Drift Handling
context: Spaced repetition uses FSRS algorithm.
decision: calculateRetrievability() handles new cards (null), treats clock drift as just-reviewed.

impact.biz: Learning curve depends on correct retrievability

title: FSRS Step Format Unification: number[] <-> string[]
context: DTO layer uses number[] (minutes) for FSRS config steps.
decision: parseStepToMinutes() converts any format to positive number.

title: BA (Basic Auth) Configuration Flag is Hard-Fail
context: BA authentication requires explicit opt-in via BA_AUTH_ENABLED=true.
decision: baAuthInterceptor checks config.ba.enabled. If false, return 401 immediately.

title: Auth Excluded Paths Whitelist
context: AUTH_EXCLUDED_PATHS defines routes that skip authentication check.
decision: authHandler checks requiresAuth() which tests AUTH_EXCLUDED_PATHS first.

impact.biz: Public endpoints must be explicitly allowed

title: Authentication Priority: API Token > JWT
context: Two authentication methods coexist: API Token (Bearer header) and JWT (cookie/header).
decision: apiTokenAuthMiddleware runs first and sets request.user if valid token found.

impact.biz: API token users have first-class auth support

title: JWT Authentication via CurrentUser Decorator
context: Backend API needs secure authentication mechanism.
decision: Backend controllers use @CurrentUser() decorator to get authenticated user info.

title: Workspace Auto-Initialization Safety Net
context: ensureUserWorkspace middleware auto-initializes Echoe workspace.
decision: Middleware logs errors but doesn't fail request.

title: Error Handler Response Format Divergence
context: errorHandler middleware format differs from other API responses.
decision: HttpError returns httpCode status + { status: 'error', message }.

title: IOC Container Auto-Load Services via Glob
context: Backend dependency injection needs automated management.
decision: Backend IOC container auto-loads via glob patterns in src/ioc.ts.

title: Git Commit Requires Pre-commit Hooks
context: Code quality and commit standards need enforcement.
decision: All Git commits must pass pre-commit hooks. Never use --no-verify.

title: LanceDB List Field NULL Handling
context: LanceDB uses Arrow data types.
decision: When addColumns valueSql is List type, use arrow_cast(NULL, 'List(Utf8)').

title: Docker Image Build Package Dependency Priority
context: pnpm monorepo Docker image build needs correct dependency order.
decision: Docker build order must package workspace dependencies first.

title: Production Image Use Frozen-lockfile and --prod
context: Production images need deterministic dependencies and minimal size.
decision: Production image must use pnpm install --prod --frozen-lockfile.

title: Turbo Build Cache Force Rebuild
context: Turbo caches build results.
decision: When needing full rebuild, use turbo run build --force.

title: Page-Level Service Unified Registration
context: Frontend page Service and child component Service management needs clear hierarchy.
decision: Page-level component Service should be registered in page-level bindServices.

title: Unit Test Files Cannot Be Deleted
context: Test code is important part of code quality assurance.
decision: Unit test files cannot be deleted. Test file location: src/__tests__/.

title: No Foreign Keys - Application Layer Integrity
context: MySQL database design follows specific foreign key strategy.
decision: No foreign key constraints at database level. All relational integrity validation must be implemented in application layer.

impact.tech: Application layer needs to implement relational data consistency checks
impact.biz: Prevent cascade delete causing data loss

title: pnpm Workspace Unified Package Management
context: Project uses pnpm monorepo structure.
decision: All npm package installation must use pnpm. Never use npm or yarn.

impact.tech: Ensure all developers have consistent dependency tree

title: All Logs Must Use Unified Logger Package
context: Backend service logs need unified management.
decision: All backend service log output must use @echoe/logger package. Never use console.log.

title: Database Migration Must Complete via Scripts
context: Database table structure changes need version control.
decision: Any database schema changes must be implemented via migration scripts.

title: MySQL VARCHAR Primary Key and Relation Field Max Length
context: MySQL has 191 character limit for single column index under utf8mb4 charset.
decision: VARCHAR primary key and relation ID field max length is 191 characters.

impact.biz: Constraints on global unique identifier generation strategy

title: Timestamp Fields Use Millisecond Precision
context: System needs precise event order recording.
decision: Timestamp fields use timestamp('created_at', { mode: 'date', fsp: 3 }) format.

title: Drizzle Migration Must Build TypeScript First
context: Drizzle Kit reads schema definitions from compiled JavaScript output.
decision: Must run pnpm build before generating database migrations.

impact.tech: Ensure schema changes are correctly detected

title: Backend and Frontend Service Cannot Be Confused
context: Project has two Service concepts.
decision: Backend Service (TypeDI) for business logic, Frontend Service (@rabjs/react) for state management.

title: User Workspace Initialization Requirement
context: Echoe feature requires initialized workspace per user.
decision: EchoeSeedService.ensureUserWorkspace(uid) creates default workspace if missing.

title: API Token Authentication for Integrations
context: API tokens allow external integrations to authenticate.
decision: validateToken(plaintextToken) checks token validity and returns associated uid.

title: Media Storage Key Architecture
context: Media files need persistent location tracking.
decision: EchoeMediaDto includes storageKey field for dynamic URL generation.

impact.biz: Supports both local and cloud deployment

title: Anki Compatible Fields and Rich Text Fields Parallel Model
context: System supports Anki import/export while providing rich text editing capability.
decision: System uses parallel model: traditional Anki fields + richTextFields.

title: Data Fields Unified JSON Object as Default Value
context: System data field used for flexible business data storage.
decision: All table data fields unified use '{}' as empty value.

title: Search Based on First Field sfld
context: System needs note search functionality.
decision: Search function based on sfld using LIKE query.

impact.tech: Full-text search based on sfld field

title: Deduplication Check Based on flds/sfld/csum Semantics
context: System needs to detect and handle duplicate notes.
decision: Deduplication logic directly reads flds, sfld, csum for duplicate comparison.

impact.tech: Deduplication depends on traditional Anki fields
impact.biz: Provide duplicate detection and deduplication suggestions

title: Import/Export Uses Traditional notes Table Structure
context: System supports Anki format import/export.
decision: Import/export uses traditional SQLite notes table structure.

title: Frontend Web Application Fixed Width Design
context: Web application positioned as PC management tool.
decision: Web frontend uses fixed width design, main container sets max-w-[600px].

title: Web Application Supports Dark and Light Themes
context: Users need to switch themes based on usage scenario.
decision: Web application supports two themes: light mode and dark mode.

title: Web Application Icons Unified lucide-react
context: UI components need consistent icon library.
decision: Web application all icons must use lucide-react library.

title: Web Application Search via Ctrl+K Shortcut
context: Users need quick access to search function.
decision: Shortcut Ctrl+K or Cmd+K quickly opens search dialog.

title: Frontend State Management Unified @rabjs/react
context: Frontend needs unified reactive state management solution.
decision: All frontend state management must use @rabjs/react.

title: Backend Startup Sequence and Dependencies
context: Backend services have dependencies between modules.
decision: Backend startup sequence: IOC Container -> MySQL -> Migrations -> LanceDB -> Scheduler -> Express.

title: API Routes Follow v1 Versioning
context: System needs to support API version management.
decision: All API controllers use @JsonController('/api/v1/resource') format.
